nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoahaz, and all that he did and his might, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoahaz and all that he did, and his might, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

cnv.text: 約哈斯其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，以及他的英勇事蹟，不是都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 约哈斯其他的事及其一切所作所为和成就都记在以色列的列王史上。
